name: invoice_number_present
expression: invoice_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(invoice_number)) > 0
description: Invoice number is required for accounts payable matching.

name: vendor_name_present
expression: vendor_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(vendor_name)) > 0
description: Vendor name is required for payment routing.

name: total_amount_non_negative
expression: total_amount IS NOT NULL AND total_amount >= 0
description: Invoice total must be present and non-negative.

name: due_date_not_before_invoice_date
expression: invoice_date IS NULL OR due_date IS NULL OR due_date >= invoice_date
description: Due date should not precede invoice date.
